nasb.text: I will rejoice over them to do them good and will faithfully plant them in this land with all My heart and with all My soul.

esv.text: I will rejoice in doing them good, and I will plant them in this land in faithfulness, with all my heart and all my soul.

cnv.text: 我必喜歡他們，使他們得到福樂；我必全心全意、真誠地把他們栽種在這地上。’

ccb.text: 我必以恩待他们为乐，全心全意在这地方培育他们。
